summary_en: 4,617,700 common shares cancelled (1.16% of shares outstanding before cancellation). Effective 2026-05-29 per board resolution 2026-05-13. Post-cancellation issued shares: 405,658,130.
title_en: Notice Regarding Completion of Treasury Stock Cancellation
translation_en_brief: MatsukiyoCocokara & Co. completed the cancellation of 4,617,700 treasury shares on 2026-05-29 pursuant to a board resolution passed on 2026-05-13 and in accordance with Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancelled shares represent 1.16% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock) prior to cancellation. Following the cancellation, the company's total issued shares stand at 405,658,130.
